y2k-snack.title: Which Y2K Snack Are You?
y2k-snack.desc: Answer 6 deeply unserious questions and our totally unqualified algorithm will diagnose your entire personality based on a discontinued lunchbox snack. No notes.

questions.text: It's Friday night. Where you at?

options.label: Throwing a party nobody asked for
Crying to a playlist I made for this
Off the grid, not answering texts
Color-coding next week's plans

questions.text: Your role in the group chat is:

options.label: Sending 47 unhinged memes a minute
The paragraph-long emotional confessions
Left on read, replies 3 days later
The one actually making the plans
Glitter butterfly clips & pure chaos
Heart locket & a secret diary
Frosted tips, sunglasses indoors
Label maker & a gel pen collection
Starting drama purely for content
Falling in love in 4 business days
Emotionally unavailable (but cute)
Saying 'I'm fine' while spiraling
An airhorn. Obviously.
A sad acoustic cover of a pop song
Silent. Always silent.
The intro to a productivity podcast

questions.text: Pick the vibe for your funeral:

options.label: Bouncy castle & confetti cannons
Everyone sobbing dramatically
I faked it. I'm in Tulum.
Perfectly catered & exactly on schedule

dunk.name: DUNKAROOS
dunk.tagline: You ARE the party — and also the reason it got shut down.
dunk.desc: You run on nostalgia and bad decisions. People can't stay mad at you because you're basically a walking dopamine rush in human form. Frosting optional, chaos mandatory.

gush.name: GUSHERS
gush.tagline: Sweet on the outside, completely liquid on the inside.
gush.desc: One bite and you EXPLODE with feelings. You fall hard, text first, and have already named your future kids. Your love language is the 2am paragraph. We respect it.

capri.name: CAPRI SUN
capri.tagline: Impossible to read, impossible to open.
capri.desc: Everyone wants to know what's going on with you and nobody ever will. You stab your own straw through the back and ghost with elegance. Effortlessly iconic.

lunch.name: LUNCHABLES
lunch.tagline: You build your own fun out of spare parts.
lunch.desc: You're the planner, the host, the one with the color-coded spreadsheet. You assemble joy with military precision and then quietly need a nap. A legend, frankly.

toxic-trait.title: What's Your Actual Toxic Trait?
toxic-trait.desc: Six questions, zero judgment (okay, a little judgment). Find out which specific flavor of terrible you are. Results cannot be used in court.

questions.text: A friend cancels on you last minute. You:

options.label: Perform being fine while absolutely not being fine
Post a vague sad story within the hour
Honestly? You were kind of relieved.
Update your mental scorecard of this friendship

questions.text: You're at a party. Where are you?

options.label: In the middle of a story where everything is about you
Telling a stranger your entire life story in the bathroom
On your phone by the wall counting down to leaving
Quietly reorganizing the host's playlist because it was wrong

questions.text: Someone says 'we need to talk.' You:

options.label: Already have three different monologues drafted
Tell your entire friend group before the conversation happens
Read the message and stare at the ceiling for 45 minutes
Start bullet-pointing your grievances in the Notes app
A heartfelt speech where you're clearly still the real victim
An 800-word DM, proofread six times, sent at 1am
'It is what it is' and no actual follow-through
A documented timeline of every contributing event
Announce you're entering your villain era (publicly)
Process it out loud in real-time to whoever will listen
Block, delete, and pretend it never happened
Build a detailed spreadsheet of the incident history
Being witnessed
Trauma dumping at 2am
'I'm not a hugger' (secretly desperate for affection)
A perfectly scheduled quality-time block in the shared calendar

main.name: MAIN CHARACTER
main.tagline: Everyone is a supporting character in your biopic and they know it.
main.desc: You narrate your own life in real time. Every setback is a plot twist, every outfit is a statement. People find you exhausting and fascinating in equal measure — which is exactly how you like it.

over.name: CHRONIC OVERSHARER
over.tagline: Your trauma has a PR team and it's working overtime.
over.desc: You process emotions the way others breathe — out loud, in public, to anyone who will listen. Your friends know everything. Your coworkers know too much. Strangers on the subway know your full situationship history. It's a gift, honestly.

avail.name: EMOTIONALLY MIA
avail.tagline: Impossible to reach. Perfect attendance at ghosting.
avail.desc: You've made an art form out of being low-key unreachable. You don't do 'the talk.' You don't do 'checking in.' You disappear for two weeks and come back as if nothing happened. People are fascinated by you. They shouldn't be. But they are.

perf.name: PASSIVE-AGGRESSIVE PERFECTIONIST
perf.tagline: Fine. It's fine. Everything is fine. (It's not fine.)
perf.desc: You hold yourself to an impossible standard and then — crucially — hold everyone else to it too. You say 'no worries!' but you are worrying. You've redone the shared doc four times without mentioning it. The passive-aggressive smile is perfected.

vibe-check.title: What's Your Actual Vibe?
vibe-check.desc: Six questions to determine which specific flavor of internet-personality-era you currently occupy. Results are scientifically meaningless but spiritually accurate.

options.label: 'New week new me' spiral ending in DoorDash at midnight
Soft lighting, lo-fi beats, journaling that goes nowhere
Accidentally started a full skincare routine at 11pm
Genuinely went to bed at 10pm and woke up refreshed
A chaotic masterpiece of 200 unfinished thoughts
Carefully organized with dividers and aesthetic emoji
Manifestation lists that somehow keep working
One note that just says 'egg' from 2019
Say 'thank you' and immediately become more
Spiral quietly for three business days
Archive it as content for your character development arc
Genuinely don't know what they mean
Starting six plans and committing to none
Candles, a movie I've seen four times, no people
Going somewhere nobody expected, posting about it cryptically
Leaving the party to go to the 24hr grocery store alone
Controlled explosion at a thrift store
Pinterest board called 'calm' with 4,000 pins
Three different aesthetics at once, zero apology
'I don't have an aesthetic, I just exist'
Someone reorganized your chaotic system and ruined everything
You were too soft for this world and eventually snapped
You peaked too early and had to reinvent entirely
You discovered capitalism. That was it.

chaos.name: CHAOTIC GOOD
chaos.tagline: You contain multitudes. Specifically, too many.
chaos.desc: Plans are suggestions. Your energy is a public service. People don't know what you'll do next and honestly, neither do you — which is somehow exactly why everyone wants to be around you. The chaos is the point.

soft.name: SOFT LAUNCH
soft.tagline: Tender. Mysterious. Launching yourself at 5% opacity.
soft.desc: You feel everything at full volume but project at a whisper. Your Pinterest board is a diary. Your playlist is a confession. You're not hiding — you're just launching yourself very, very softly. The right people notice.

icon.name: UNHINGED ICON
icon.tagline: You live in your own cinematic universe and we're just visiting.
icon.desc: You've had at least three eras and each one was the correct one. You post cryptically. You make bold choices without explaining them. Somehow it always works out. You are the main character of a genre nobody else can identify.

weird.name: WEIRD GIRL ERA
weird.tagline: Deeply specific. Immune to trends. On your own timeline.
weird.desc: You have opinions about very particular things and zero opinions about what's currently trending. You leave parties to go to grocery stores. You have a bit. Nobody fully gets it. That's the whole point and you wouldn't change a thing.

hogwarts-house.title: Which Hogwarts House Are You Actually In?
hogwarts-house.desc: The Sorting Hat was taking requests. We are not. Answer 6 questions and get sorted into the house you actually belong in — not the one you put in your bio.

questions.text: You find a wallet with $200 cash inside. You:

options.label: Return it immediately — full cash, no reward needed
Keep it. You found it. That's basically a gift.
Return it but research the legal requirements first
Return it heroically and somehow make it a story

questions.text: Your group project partner does zero work. You:

options.label: Do everything yourself so the group doesn't fail
Subtly make sure they can't take credit afterward
Divide tasks precisely and document who did what
Confront them directly and loudly
Helping a friend move, then cooking dinner for them
A networking event you framed as a casual get-together
Deep-diving a new subject or hobby for 12 hours straight
Spontaneous road trip at 11pm — destination TBD

questions.text: Someone talks over you in a meeting. You:

options.label: Let it go. The idea will speak for itself eventually.
Wait, then say 'as I was saying...' with terrifying calm
Email your full point with sources cited afterward
Interrupt right back, louder

questions.text: You get lost on a hike. You:

options.label: Stay calm and wait — someone will come eventually
Identify the most resourceful position and reassess from there
Navigate using sun position, trail markers, and available data
Pick a direction and walk confidently — action first
Knowing exactly what others need before they ask
The ability to persuade anyone of anything
Perfect memory and instant pattern recognition
Fearlessness in the face of anything

griff.name: GRYFFINDOR
griff.tagline: Act first. Apologize later. Win anyway.
griff.desc: You leap before you look and somehow stick the landing every time. Your instinct is correct. Your execution is chaotic. Nobody ever doubts you're serious, which is either your greatest asset or your greatest problem. Usually both.

huff.name: HUFFLEPUFF
huff.tagline: Soft power. Full trust. Zero drama.
huff.desc: Underestimated by everyone who hasn't been loved by you. You show up, you follow through, and you quietly outlast every dramatic person in the room. The most reliable house. Full stop. Also the best snack selection in the common room.

raven.name: RAVENCLAW
raven.tagline: The answer exists. You will find it.
raven.desc: Every problem is a puzzle. Every conversation is a research opportunity. You've googled things for fun since before it was a personality type. You're not a nerd — you're just operating at a different frequency. It's a compliment, we promise.

slyth.name: SLYTHERIN
slyth.tagline: Everything is a chess move. You're already 6 ahead.
slyth.desc: Not evil. Strategic. There's a difference (technically). You play the long game, you remember everything, and you know that sometimes the most powerful move is the one nobody sees coming. You were never actually the villain. Probably.

friend-type.title: What Type of Friend Are You?
friend-type.desc: Which specific archetype of friend are you bringing to the group chat? Results are not a guarantee of quality friendship but are 100% accurate regardless.

questions.text: A friend texts you at 2am: 'we need to talk.' You:

options.label: Call immediately, activate full therapist mode
Send 12 voice notes of chaotic theories about what happened
See it at 10am: 'lol what happened'
'OMG WHAT WHO DO I NEED TO FIGHT'

questions.text: Your friend gets a terrible haircut. You:

options.label: Ask how they feel about it and validate their emotions carefully
'Bestie it's giving something I can't name yet'
Don't mention it. What haircut.
'I LOVE IT. This is their era. This is everything.'

questions.text: Your friend group has drama. You are:

options.label: The mediator who heard every side and said nothing
Accidentally the reason there's drama
Blissfully unaware — you missed 600 messages
On whoever's side has the most compelling argument right now
Make a spreadsheet with everyone's budgets and dietary needs
Suggest somewhere completely unhinged and get outvoted
Agree enthusiastically, then maybe show up, maybe not
Hype up every suggestion until the group can't decide

questions.text: Your friend is going through a breakup. You:

options.label: Drop everything, buy snacks, listen for four hours
Show up with an elaborate six-step revenge plan
Send 'omg I'm so sorry 💔' three days later
'You're ten times better than them, this is your GLOW UP ERA'
Actually remembering every important thing people tell you
Making any boring situation into a story
Always having information despite being offline constantly
Making people feel like the most interesting person in any room

ther.name: THE THERAPIST FRIEND
ther.kind: The One Who Holds It Together
ther.tagline: You know everyone's business. You chose kindness.
ther.desc: You hold the entire group together with your bare hands and they don't even know it. You remember everyone's trauma, their coworker's names, and their ex's full timeline. You deserve so much rest. Please rest. We love you.

chao.name: THE CHAOS AGENT
chao.tagline: The night you're involved in? A story forever.
chao.desc: Every group needs one. You are the one. Nothing you do is predictable, everything you suggest is a risk, and somehow that's exactly why you're on every contact list. You make life more interesting by existing in it.

ghost.name: THE GHOST FRIEND
ghost.tagline: Gone for three weeks. Back with perfect timing.
ghost.desc: Deeply loved. Perpetually MIA. You respond when the universe aligns for you, and somehow that makes people miss you more. You're not flaky — you're just operating on a different orbital cycle. Everyone is genuinely happy when you appear.

hype.name: THE HYPE PERSON
hype.tagline: Everyone leaves your presence feeling invincible.
hype.desc: You see potential in everyone and you make sure they know it. You are the group chat energy, the standing ovation, the person who makes someone's normal Tuesday feel like a movie moment. You are, genuinely, an actual gift.

internet-era.title: Which Era of the Internet Are You?
internet-era.desc: The internet has passed through distinct psychological epochs. Which one shaped your entire personality? Probably all of them, but specifically one more than the others.

questions.text: Your ideal social media format is:

options.label: An auto-play song and glitter GIF header on your profile
A dark aesthetic photo with a lowercase quote in Helvetica
A 6-second video, no context, pure chaos
A 5-paragraph caption with three nested jokes
'brb g2g ttyl' and you absolutely mean it
Long, lowercase, poetic. Aesthetic very deliberate.
You respond exclusively in memes and references
A voice note that is somehow 9 minutes long
Being removed from someone's Top 8
An anonymous callout post with gifsets and tags
A 6-second video of your most embarrassing moment going viral
A 47-part thread with screenshots and a pinned summary
A stranger's profile song hitting different at 11pm
A reblog with 200k notes and zero original context
A clip that's been stuck in your head for seven years
A 2am algorithm rabbit hole you cannot explain
Removing someone from your Top 8 publicly
Posting song lyrics at 3am with absolutely no explanation
A perfectly timed one-liner that became a meme
A 'I've been doing a lot of reflecting' post with 400 reposts
Somewhere a profile you made in 2004 still exists
A fanfiction someone still quotes to this day
A 6-second clip still circulating in 2026
A thread so comprehensive it has its own citations

y2k.name: EARLY INTERNET VETERAN
y2k.tagline: You had a Neopets account and were NOT playing around.
y2k.desc: You peaked on MySpace and you know it. You curated your Top 8 with military precision. The glitter GIFs were art. The auto-play songs were statements. You were there before the algorithm and you were absolutely thriving.

tumblr.name: TUMBLR REFUGEE
tumblr.tagline: The gifsets you made were genuinely cinematic.
tumblr.desc: You were radicalized by fanfiction and you haven't fully recovered. Your aesthetic was immaculate. Your mental health was questionable. You reblogged a 'stay alive' post at 2am and felt genuinely moved. You're mostly fine now.

vine.name: VINE BRAIN
vine.tagline: Road work ahead? Yeah, I sure hope it does.
vine.desc: You communicate in 6-second references and you don't fully understand why people don't get them. The platform is dead but you carry it in your soul. It is Wednesday, my dudes. It will always be Wednesday.

current.name: CHRONICALLY ONLINE
current.tagline: You've been online so long you've become the internet.
current.desc: You have ascended beyond any single era and become something new. You speak fluent irony. You have opinions about discourse meta-discourse. You are aware of at least four ongoing controversies at all times. Unhinged. Thriving.

sports-personality.title: What's Your Sports Personality?
sports-personality.desc: Are you the diehard who paints their face, the casual fan there for vibes, or the couch oracle with seventeen hot takes? Find out which sports archetype the algorithm assigns you.

options.label: Wake up early, face paint, full kit on
Show up if a friend drags you along
Watch solo from the sofa in pajamas
Check the final score the next morning

questions.text: Your team is losing badly. You:

options.label: Yell tactical advice at the TV
Stay calm — it's just a game
Switch channels, come back for extra time
Open a different app and emotionally disengage
Nothing — you're too tense to eat
Hot dog. Classic. No notes.
Loaded nachos with extra jalapeños
Overpriced drink and vibes only
Football/Soccer — the drama is unmatched
Basketball — fast, flashy, nonstop
Tennis — tactical, intense, no excuses
Formula 1 — it's basically a TV show
Always picked first. Born competitive.
Pretty decent — just never went pro
I once ran for a bus. That counts.
I am the witness. The snack-eater.
Sacred. They fuel my entire soul.
Fun to follow from a healthy distance
The most dramatic content on TV
Exhausting but the memes are excellent

ultra.name: THE ULTRAFAN
ultra.kind: The One Who Bleeds Team Colors
ultra.tagline: You own the jersey, the scarf, and three commemorative mugs.
ultra.desc: You don't watch sports — you live them. Every referee decision is a personal attack. Every win is a religious experience. Every loss requires at least 48 hours of recovery time. The group chat dreads game day. You thrive.

casual.name: THE CASUAL FAN
casual.tagline: You enjoy sport without letting it ruin your week.
casual.desc: You know the rules, you have your favorites, and you can hold a solid conversation about the big games. But you also have a life outside of it. This is genuinely impressive. We respect it.

couch.name: THE COUCH ORACLE
couch.tagline: You could coach them. From here. Right now.
couch.desc: You know the stats, the formations, and exactly what the manager should have done. You just prefer delivering this analysis from a reclined position with snacks nearby. The players should be grateful.

vibe.name: THE VIBE FAN
vibe.tagline: You're there for the drama, the atmosphere, and the snacks.
vibe.desc: You didn't plan on caring. You definitely care now. You couldn't name three players on the roster but you have FEELINGS about this team and they are STRONG and you don't fully understand why.

disney-villain.title: Which Disney Villain Are You?
disney-villain.desc: The Sorting Hat was corrupted. The algorithm is unhinged. Find out which iconic Disney villain the data says you are — and honestly, embrace it.

questions.text: Your plan for world domination would involve:

options.label: Magical contracts with devastating fine print
Eliminating rivals with calculated precision
A dramatic curse, perfectly timed for effect
Declaring yourself in charge because obviously
Get them to sign something they'll regret
Have people handle it quietly, at a distance
Unleash thorns, darkness, and a monologue
Challenge them to a contest you'll obviously win
Manipulation through 'mutually beneficial' deals
Calculated propaganda and strategic fear
Absolute power, zero meetings
You declared yourself leader. End of discussion.
You overdesign the trap and fall into it
Underestimating the power of love (gross)
Developing inexplicable feelings for the child you cursed
Taken down by the one person you underestimated
An underwater cave full of stolen voices and bad energy
The Pride Lands, but make it gray and joyless
A castle of thorns, perpetual darkness, and vibes
A pub where everyone sings about how great you are
Shapeshifting into whatever is most manipulative
Whispering poison into powerful ears
The dramatic pause before the curse drops
The flex. Constant, relentless, the flex.

ursula.name: URSULA
ursula.tagline: The contract was technically fair. You just read faster.
ursula.desc: You have connections, contracts, and absolutely zero patience for people who don't read the fine print. You don't need to be the most powerful — you just need everyone else to owe you something. Tentacles optional.

scar.name: SCAR
scar.desc: You're not evil. You're efficient. You've already thought about who's in your way and what it would take to fix that. You're articulate, patient, and impeccably dressed. It's not personal. It's structure.

maleficent.name: MALEFICENT
maleficent.desc: You have flair, power, a self-righteous streak a mile wide, and — buried under the dark magic — genuine feelings you didn't ask for. The monologue was necessary. The horns are essential. The redemption arc was not planned.

gaston.name: GASTON
gaston.tagline: The confidence is load-bearing. Do not remove it.
gaston.desc: Roughly the size of a barge and twice as confident. You believe in yourself with a ferocity that most people reserve for religion. You didn't ask to be this impressive. It just happened. Someone had to be.

procrastinator-type.title: What Type of Procrastinator Are You?
procrastinator-type.desc: Science has identified four types. The algorithm has identified yours. Results are statistically accurate and personally devastating.

questions.text: The deadline is tomorrow. You are:

options.label: Still researching. It's not ready so it's not done.
Genuinely not thinking about it right now
Eight episodes into a show you started tonight
Printing notes at 11:58pm, somehow alive
Organized perfectly. The work remains untouched.
Buried under things you prefer not to look at directly
Open tabs: 43. Related to anything due: 0.
Not currently visible under the last-minute chaos

questions.text: People would describe your work style as:

options.label: A perfectionist who never quite ships
Mysteriously absent when stakes are high
Most fun, least reliable, somehow still liked
Somehow always delivers at the last possible second
Research 'how to start' for a solid two hours
Reorganize your email instead. Productive-adjacent.
Clean your entire apartment top to bottom
Ignore it completely and start in panic mode later
Never the right time. Conditions must be perfect first.
Pretend it doesn't exist until it screams at you
Genuinely forget it exists for an embarrassing amount of time
The ticking clock is the motivation. Without it — nothing.
When you finally submit, it's genuinely flawless
Keeping your internal stress completely invisible
Convincing everyone everything is totally fine
Miraculous efficiency under extreme deadline pressure

perf.name: THE PERFECTIONIST
perf.tagline: Not procrastinating. Waiting for optimal conditions.
perf.desc: You're not lazy — you're running a quality control operation with impossible specifications. The project exists. It is being refined. It will be submitted when it reaches a standard of excellence that, honestly, may never arrive. The intentions are excellent.

avid.name: THE AVOIDER
avid.tagline: Out of sight. Out of mind. Until it isn't.
avid.desc: Acknowledging the task would make it real. You have made the executive decision not to do that. You are fine. Everything is fine. The deadline is a concept and concepts can be managed. You will think about it later. Later is soon.

plea.name: THE PLEASURE SEEKER
plea.tagline: There was a show. It was good. That's the whole story.
plea.desc: You genuinely meant to start. Something interesting happened. Then something else. Then you rearranged your room, watched three episodes, started a new hobby, and the night is now gone. You'll make it work. You always do. Somehow.

cris.name: THE CRISIS WORKER
cris.tagline: Useless until hour 11. Legendary at hour 11.
cris.desc: The clock is not a problem. The clock is the feature. Without it, you cannot be summoned. With it, you enter a state of focused brilliance that frankly baffles people who watched you do nothing for a week. You deliver. Always. It's a gift.

sleep-personality.title: What's Your Sleep Personality?
sleep-personality.desc: Your sleep habits reveal everything about you. The algorithm has been watching the timestamps on your messages and it has reached a verdict.

questions.text: Natural bedtime with no alarm tomorrow:

options.label: 2am minimum. 4am if things get interesting.
9:30pm. Maybe 10 if I'm being absolutely wild.
Whatever the couch decides on my behalf.
11pm intended. 3am actual. Unknown causes.
Still awake, OR woken by sheer violence
Already up, making coffee, mildly insufferable about it
Startled awake somewhere I didn't plan to be
Finally entering the deepest sleep of the night
Multiple alarms, 8 minutes apart, existential dread
One alarm. Set deliberately. It's sufficient.
No alarm. Body wakes when rested. Annoying but true.
Irrelevant. Sleep is not guaranteed to occur.
At 1am in the dark while the sensible world sleeps
6am, post-coffee, before the day has corrupted me
Right before passing out mid-sentence
During the ceiling-staring portion of the 3am session
Watch everything. Wrong time zone for sleep anyway.
Read efficiently and nap at an appropriate time
Pass out before takeoff and wake confused at landing
Lie with eyes closed achieving absolutely nothing
Nocturnal by nature. Unapologetic about it.
An optimized biological routine, actually
Sleep happens. I am grateful every time.
A philosophical question with no satisfying answer

owl.name: NIGHT OWL
owl.tagline: Nocturnal. Unashamed. Functioning on vibes and spite.
owl.desc: You come alive when the sensible world goes quiet. The best thinking happens after midnight. You don't choose this — you ARE this. Mornings are a society construct and you participate minimally. Your texts sent at 2am are not a problem.

bird.name: EARLY BIRD
bird.tagline: Up at 6am. Productive by 7. Insufferable by 8.
bird.desc: You wake before the alarm with genuine enthusiasm, which is medically interesting. You have accomplished three things before most people have opened their eyes. You share this information rarely but effectively. We are in awe and also slightly annoyed.

crash.name: CRASH SLEEPER
crash.desc: Bus. Floor. Chair during a movie that you were definitely watching. Your body requires sleep and it does not ask permission. People are simultaneously jealous and concerned. You have napped in places that cannot be explained. You have no regrets.

insom.name: INSOMNIAC
insom.tagline: Horizontal. Eyes closed. Absolutely nowhere near sleep.
insom.desc: You go to bed at a reasonable hour. Then you lie there and solve problems that haven't happened yet. By 3am you've rewritten three conversations, planned a business, and questioned several life decisions. Sleep eventually finds you. Usually after something funny occurs to you.

social-media-app.title: Which Social Media App Are You?
social-media-app.desc: Not which app you use most. Which app you ARE. There is a difference and the algorithm has the answer and you might not love it.

options.label: Post raw, unfiltered, whatever hits right now
Curated aesthetic grid. Three filters minimum.
Hot take in under 280 characters, posted immediately
A board called 'future life' with 6,000 pins
Content must hook in 0.3 seconds or you are GONE
Will study a beautiful photo for up to 8 seconds
Cooked. Reading threads though. Somehow.
Infinite when color-matching aesthetics are involved
Doing something unhinged and filming the process
Finding the perfect golden hour lighting situation
Having correct opinions about things, publicly
Making vision boards for a trip you might take in 2027
A stitch of something unhinged that requires your reaction
Someone reposting your photo without credit
A ratio. You've been ratioed. It was partially justified.
Someone stealing your exact mood board layout
Chaotic, authentic, zero filter
Visually coordinated at all times. Always.
Has an opinion ready and is sharing it now
Obsessed with possibility and future plans
You start them or you ruin them. No middle ground.
You curate them before they reach mainstream
You have a take on trends regardless of participation
You save them to a board called 'maybe someday'

tktk.name: TIKTOK
tktk.tagline: Short-form. No context. Somehow universally relatable.
tktk.desc: You don't perform — you just are, and that turns out to be enough. You process life in real-time, publicly, and people find this fascinating. Your hook is unconscious. Your timing is perfect. You are the content and the content is you.

insta.name: INSTAGRAM
insta.tagline: Aspirational but make it look like it just happened.
insta.desc: Your grid is not an accident. Nothing is an accident. The casual coffee photo took three attempts and two filter adjustments. You understand that presentation is a form of communication and yours communicates: everything is beautiful and intentional.

twit.name: TWITTER / X
twit.tagline: Unhinged thoughts, extremely publicly, no notes.
twit.desc: You have thoughts. They are immediate, strong, and require witnesses. You speak in subtweets and ratio energy even in real life. You have been ratioed and it was partially your fault and you would do it again. Your drafts folder is an emotional archive.

pint.name: PINTEREST
pint.tagline: Manifesting your entire future one pin at a time.
pint.desc: You have seventeen boards, none of which represent your current life, all of which represent a version of your life that is possible and beautiful. You save things you will never buy to boards you will always reference. The vision board is load-bearing infrastructure for your personality.

conflict-style.title: What's Your Conflict Style?
conflict-style.desc: Everyone has a conflict style. Yours has a name, a color, and a tagline. The algorithm would like to present its findings. Please review calmly.

options.label: Note it. Forgive it. Never mention it. Remember it forever.
Address it directly. Possibly too directly.
Understand their perspective and yours simultaneously
Say 'no no it's fine' with a smile that ends civilizations
Disappear before the uncomfortable meeting happens
Call it out in the group chat, immediately
Facilitate a structured conversation about roles
Do their part too, mention it to no one, ever

questions.text: Someone texts 'we need to talk.' You:

options.label: Read it. Leave it. Process for six business days.
Already have three counterpoints prepared and ready
Respond calmly: 'Of course, when works for you?'
Reply 'sure! :)' while internally entering a void
Pretend it never happened. Let time do the work.
Need actual resolution or you cannot move forward
Check in with all parties to make sure they're okay
Say everything is fine. Mean nothing is fine.
Not every battle needs to be fought
Clarity is kindness. Say the thing. Say it now.
Everyone deserves to be heard before anything is decided
Conflict is awkward. Just absorb it. You're fine.

questions.text: Your friends would describe your conflict style as:

options.label: Mysteriously impossible to actually argue with
The one who says the thing everyone else thought but didn't
The one everyone calls to navigate group disasters
Carries a three-year grievance in complete silence

avoid.name: THE AVOIDER
avoid.kind: The World's Most Patient Time Bomb
avoid.tagline: You don't avoid conflict. You just wait it out forever.
avoid.desc: You believe, on some level, that if you don't acknowledge it, it might stop existing. This is occasionally correct. The rest of the time, you are cataloguing a detailed mental archive of every slight, every time someone was wrong, every unresolved moment. It's fine. You're fine.

fight.name: THE DIRECT CONFRONTER
fight.kind: The One Who Says the Thing
fight.tagline: Say it. Say it now. Why is no one saying it?
fight.desc: You believe that tension should be addressed, immediately, out loud, in front of everyone involved. You find silence around issues physically uncomfortable. People find you intense. You find people not saying the thing unbearable. Somehow this works out.

medi.name: THE MEDIATOR
medi.tagline: You've heard every side and somehow still care about all of them.
medi.desc: You can hold two opposing truths at once and help others find the overlap. You have never escalated a conflict in your life. People call you when it's really bad. You pick up. You're not sure when this became your brand but here you are, and you're excellent at it.

pass.name: PASSIVE-AGGRESSIVE PRO
pass.tagline: Fine. It's fine. I said it's fine. (It is not fine.)
pass.desc: You absorb everything. You perform okay. You say 'no worries' and you are worrying. You've done their task without mentioning it. The smile is deployed. The inner scoreboard is meticulous and up to date. Some things remain unresolved from 2019. This is fine.

decade-type.title: Which Decade Are You?
decade-type.desc: Your aesthetic, your chaos, your entire personality — they all belong to a specific decade. The algorithm has done the math. It's giving you a result whether you're ready or not.

options.label: Flowy, earthy, effortlessly unpolished
Maximalist. Shoulder pads are NOT underrated.
Baggy jeans, band tee, zero effort, still good
Low-rise, velour, bedazzled, chaotic energy
Soul, funk, classic rock — on vinyl
Synth-pop, power ballads, and hairspray
Grunge, Britpop, mixtapes made for people
Pop princesses, boy bands, and Limewire risks
Dancing freely and not caring who's watching
The loudest, most dramatic, most fun person
Cool kid energy, ironically enjoying everything
Taking blurry photos on a digital camera
Peace, freedom, do your own thing
Go big. There is no 'don't go at all.'
Apathy is a vibe and I've committed to it
Everything is a bit unhinged and that's the brand
Nature, no schedule, absolute freedom
A full itinerary, every moment deliberately curated
See what happens. Could be legendary. Could be nothing.
Mall. Movie. Group of fifteen people. Somehow chaos.
Idealism that ignores inconvenient logistics
So dramatic you occasionally lose the room
Ironic detachment from everything including joy
Nostalgia for an era you barely even lived

s70.name: THE 70s
s70.tagline: Peace, love, and zero fixed plans.
s70.desc: You believe in freedom, community, and the idea that if something feels right, it probably is. You have strong opinions about authenticity and weak opinions about schedules. Your aesthetic is effortlessly lived-in. Your vibe is structurally unavoidable.

s80.name: THE 80s
s80.tagline: Go big or stay home is not a suggestion, it's a lifestyle.
s80.desc: Subtlety is for people who haven't tried commitment. You do everything at volume — fashion, feelings, fun. The shoulder pads were structural. The power ballads were necessary. The synth was load-bearing. You have never done anything small and you never will.

s90.name: THE 90s
s90.tagline: Effortlessly detached, deeply sincere about it.
s90.desc: You care deeply about not seeming to care. The irony is a costume but the mixtape is real. You have feelings about specific albums that shaped your entire personality and you express them through indirection and recommendation. The flannel was a choice. It was the right choice.

s00.name: THE 2000s
s00.tagline: Unhinged energy, bedazzled execution, zero apologies.
s00.desc: Everything was a little too much and that was correct. The butterfly clips were necessary. The low-rise was bold. The group photos on digital cameras were art. You carry this era with you and occasionally it escapes in a way that is very recognizable. We love it.

energy-type.title: What Kind of Energy Do You Have?
energy-type.desc: Not vibes. Not aesthetic. Your actual energy — the specific force field you emit that makes rooms change temperature. The algorithm has a reading.

options.label: Feel it recalibrate around you
Blend in perfectly until you're needed
Walk in and the vibe drops three degrees
Trip slightly, spill nothing, make it work somehow
You are the reason the chat exists
The observer who drops one perfect take per week
The message that starts a 200-reply thread
Eleven unhinged messages in a row, then silence for days
A comeback arc begins today. The comeback arc is always today.
Quietly crushing it with no announcement necessary
Starting the week with a power move, no explanation
Showing up somehow. No one, including you, knows how.
You were the hero until the world let you down publicly
You watched from the background long enough to understand
You didn't need one. Born knowing.
Not one event. A vibe accumulation over several years.
Cinematically lit at all times, even candid photos
Effortlessly present, wherever that happens to be
Calculated. Slightly intimidating. Intentional.
Controlled chaos. Emphasis on the chaos.
Magnetic, dramatic, occasionally a lot, always worth it
The one who makes things work without taking credit
Formidable. And they mean it as a compliment. Mostly.
Unpredictable but somehow beloved and they can't explain it

main.name: MAIN CHARACTER
main.tagline: Everything happens to you specifically. On purpose.
main.desc: You narrate your own life in real time and the narration is compelling. You don't seek drama — drama correctly identifies you as the most interesting person in the building and introduces itself. People leave conversations with you feeling like they were in a scene. They were.

side.name: BACKGROUND LEGEND
side.tagline: The scene only works because you're in it.
side.desc: You are not in the foreground. You are the reason the foreground holds. You know everything, say things at exactly the right moment, and make other people look better by proximity. The main characters would be so much worse without you. Some of them know this.

vill.name: VILLAIN ERA
vill.tagline: Not actually a villain. Just extremely deliberate.
vill.desc: You don't walk into a room — you arrive. Your energy clears space before you take up any. People call it intimidating; you call it deliberate. You are not in your villain era. You are in your power era and the naming convention is incorrect.

grem.name: CHAOS GREMLIN
grem.tagline: Unpredictable. Beloved. Operating on separate physics.
grem.desc: Nobody can predict what you'll do next and that includes you. Things happen around you that cannot be fully explained. You mean well. The chaos is not intentional. It just... accumulates in your vicinity. People find this endearing. They should be more scared.

music-era.title: Which Music Era Are You?
music-era.desc: From vinyl and bell-bottoms to algorithmic playlists and bedroom pop — every era has a vibe. Which one does the algorithm say matches your soul?

options.label: Vinyl player, warm lamp, no interruptions
CD Walkman with slightly tangled headphones
iPod shuffle — beautiful chaos
Algorithmic playlist that knows me too well

options.label: A trusted friend hands me a physical recommendation
A music video I happened to catch on TV
Obscure blogs and friends with taste
Short-form video app rabbit holes at 1am
Intimate club show — 200 people, real soul
Stadium spectacle with light shows and merch
Festival set you discovered by accident
Artist livestream from their actual bedroom

questions.text: Pick a genre for a full day of listening:

options.label: Classic rock, soul, or jazz
Pop, R&B, and early hip-hop
Indie, emo, or whatever was core to me at 15
Hyperpop, bedroom pop, whatever's trending

questions.text: How do you organize your music?

options.label: By album, in order, as the artist intended
Burned CDs with hand-drawn track lists
An overstuffed library I pretend is curated
A billion playlists for every micro-mood
An art form that demands patience and respect
The soundtrack to my most defining memories
Something I feel deeply but can't always explain
Content that finds me at exactly the right moment

classic.name: CLASSIC ERA
classic.tagline: You believe music peaked somewhere between 1965 and 1985.
classic.desc: Everything since has been, in your considered view, a slow decline. You own at least one band t-shirt older than most of your friends, and you have strong opinions about which pressing sounds better. We respect the commitment.

nineties.name: 90s / 00s ERA
nineties.tagline: Having your song on someone's CD mix was the ultimate gesture.
nineties.desc: You came of age when music videos were an event, boy bands were serious business, and a burned CD mix was romance in physical form. You still know every lyric to songs you haven't heard in fifteen years.

indie.name: 2010s ERA
indie.tagline: You discovered yourself through music that most people forgot.
indie.desc: You felt every lyric personally, have strong opinions about albums most people skipped, and still consider a specific set of songs to be load-bearing infrastructure of your personality. It shaped you. We can tell.

algo.name: ALGORITHM ERA
algo.kind: Spotify Knows You Better Than You Do
algo.tagline: You've fully let go and the playlist is driving now.
algo.desc: You discover artists through 15-second clips, your Spotify Wrapped is a genuine personality test, and you are completely at peace with letting an algorithm make your listening decisions. Bold. Efficient. Very 2020s.

kpop-which-group.title: Which K-pop Boy Group Are You?
kpop-which-group.desc: Are you a stadium-filling purple army or a self-produced pirate with no chill? Answer 8 unhinged questions and we'll tell you which K-pop boy group matches your entire personality.

Split into 3 sub-units and rehearse for 72 consecutive hours
Design an entire cinematic universe involving treasure and existential dread

bts.name: BTS
bts.tagline: You don't just want to succeed — you want to change the entire world while doing it.
bts.desc: You operate on a different frequency than most. You feel things deeply, create even deeper, and somehow manage to inspire millions just by being authentically yourself. Your group chat is equal parts heartfelt confessions and unhinged memes. ARMY would follow you anywhere.

skz.name: STRAY KIDS
skz.tagline: You produce, write, mix, choreograph, and style yourself — and then start over at 3am.
skz.desc: You have a vision and you will execute it yourself because nobody else will do it right. Sleep is a suggestion. Compromise is not in your vocabulary. You once said 'I did it my way' and it became your entire personality. STAY are obsessed and honestly? Correct.

svt.name: SEVENTEEN
svt.tagline: You believe in teamwork so hard you practically ARE a perfectly synchronized sub-unit.
svt.desc: You thrive when everyone's rowing in the same direction. You're the person who shows up prepared, knows everyone's role, and somehow holds the group together through sheer will and an obsessive rehearsal schedule. 13+3+1 is not a math problem — it's a philosophy. CARAT energy.

atz.name: ATEEZ
atz.tagline: You perform every single thing in life like it's the finale of a world tour.
atz.desc: You commit fully, passionately, and without a single ounce of self-consciousness. A minor task becomes a production. A group trip becomes an adventure. You once teared up at a particularly good sunset and you would do it again. 8 makes 1 team and ATINY knows it.

taylor-swift-era.title: Which Taylor Swift Era Are You?
taylor-swift-era.desc: Answer 6 deceptively personal questions and we'll tell you which Taylor Swift era matches your current personality. Scooter Braun cannot see these results.

options.label: Hopeful, sparkly, a tiara for no reason
Every emotion at full volume, all at once

A cabin, a candle, and my own thoughts for 6 hours

fearless.desc: You're operating on pure genuine optimism and honestly? Good for you. You believe things work out. You show up on time. You still think fairy tale endings happen and you're out here collecting evidence. Sequins not required but strongly implied.

red.name: THE RED ERA
red.tagline: Every emotion arrives at 11/10. There is no medium.
red.desc: You feel things deeply and loudly and you wouldn't change it. Joy feels like a montage. Heartbreak feels like an album. You've cried in a parking lot for reasons you'd call 'complicated' and there was absolutely a scarf involved somewhere.

reputation.name: THE REPUTATION ERA
reputation.tagline: You let them think what they want. That IS the strategy.
reputation.desc: You went quiet and you went hard. Nobody knows what you're planning and that's exactly how you like it. You've done a full rebrand at least once and emerged stronger. The old you? Fine. Just not taking questions at this time.

folklore.name: THE FOLKLORE ERA
folklore.tagline: You write in margins. You feel things in a forest.
folklore.desc: You process the world through metaphor and you wouldn't have it any other way. You're currently in a cardigan you've had for six years, thinking about something that happened in 2017. There's a journal. It's full. It got you through.

main-character.title: What's Your Main Character Energy?
main-character.desc: We're all the main character in our own movie. But which type? Answer 6 questions and we'll tell you exactly what your personal narrative arc looks like right now.

options.label: I trip over the door and it somehow looks cool
Headphones in, late, pretending not to notice anything
Early. Already know everyone's names. On my third water.
Slow motion. Playlist running. Wind somehow in my hair.
Somehow caused it AND am the one fixing it
Didn't ask to be here but now I'm apparently involved
Already knew. Was watching from a safe distance.
Narrate it internally with orchestral music
Accidentally making every situation 10x more interesting
Surviving things that should have broken me
Knowing where the power is and not touching it yet
Manifesting like it's a part-time job

questions.text: The group needs a leader. You:

options.label: Accidentally become it through sheer chaotic energy
Say 'not me' and then reluctantly accept the role
Let someone else take credit. For now.
Already sent the agenda. The meeting is in 10.
Learning that maybe having a plan is useful
Discovering I might be the hero I was waiting for
Stepping into the light. Finally.
Completing my second major character upgrade

questions.text: The movie of your life would be called:

options.label: How Did This Happen (Again)
I Didn't Sign Up For This
The One You Forgot About
Inevitable

chaos.name: THE CHAOTIC PROTAGONIST
chaos.tagline: You are the plot twist that nobody wrote but everyone needed.
chaos.desc: You didn't mean to start it and you can't stop it and honestly neither can anyone else. Things just happen around you. You trip into adventures. You accidentally cause character development in everyone you meet. The chaos IS the point.

reluctant.name: THE RELUCTANT HERO
reluctant.tagline: You didn't volunteer for this. The universe volunteered you.
reluctant.desc: You keep saying you're not a main character but the evidence disagrees. You've survived more than you mention. You've shown up in more people's stories than you know. The reluctance is actually the most protagonist thing about you.

darkhorse.name: THE DARK HORSE
darkhorse.tagline: Everyone slept on you. They'll be awake soon.
darkhorse.desc: You've been in the background, watching, knowing, waiting for the right moment. You're not under the radar. You ARE the radar. When you finally move, people will say 'I always knew it' and you'll let them because you're gracious like that.

legend.name: THE CHOSEN ONE
legend.tagline: You know exactly who you are and you're thriving in it.
legend.desc: You've accepted your main character status and you carry it beautifully. You walk into rooms with intention. Your playlist is always exactly right. You've done the inner work. You're not becoming someone — you already are. The glow-up is complete.

love-language.title: What's Your Love Language? (Brutally Honest Edition)

Notice what I need before I say it and just do it
Put their phone down and actually be present
Show up with something small that says 'I thought of you'
Someone to tell me I'm doing well and will be okay
Someone to make tea and handle a thing I forgot
Someone to just sit with me. No advice. Just here.
A long hug. And maybe a little something.
They never say it out loud even when I need to hear it
They see me struggling and just... watch
They're there but scrolling the whole time
We haven't properly connected in weeks

questions.text: A perfect Sunday with the person you love looks like:

options.label: They leave a note saying exactly how they feel
They handle everything and I don't have to think once
We do nothing but do it completely together
Cozy, close, small surprises, physical presence

questions.text: Be honest — your toxic love trait is:

options.label: Needing verbal reassurance more than once about the same thing
Doing everything and quietly resenting people who don't notice
Interpreting phone-checking as emotional abandonment
Mistaking proximity for emotional connection

words.name: WORDS OF AFFIRMATION
words.kind: The One Who Needs to Hear It
words.tagline: Say it. Out loud. While looking at me. Thank you.
words.desc: You don't take care for granted — you need it to be said. A compliment from someone you love lands like sunlight. Silence reads as absence. You communicate with words because that's how love makes sense to you, and you need the same signal back.

acts.name: ACTS OF SERVICE
acts.tagline: Love is a verb. Specifically: 'I refilled your water bottle.'
acts.desc: You love through doing and you feel loved when someone does for you. Not big gestures — small, specific, seen things. Someone fixing your thing, handling your forgotten task, making it easier without being asked. That's the whole language.

quality.name: QUALITY TIME
quality.kind: The One Who Just Wants You Here
quality.tagline: Put the phone down. That's the whole quiz.
quality.desc: You don't need elaborate plans. You need undivided presence. When someone is with you, they should be WITH you — not half here, half somewhere else in their head or their screen. Presence is the gift. Being chosen with full attention is everything.

touch.name: PHYSICAL TOUCH & GIFTS
touch.tagline: You bond through warmth and small thoughtful things.
touch.desc: Closeness recharges you. A hand on your shoulder, a long hug, a little thing that says 'I thought about you while you weren't there' — these aren't extras for you, they're the point. You speak in warmth and presence and you need it returned.

villain-type.title: Which Type of Villain Are You?
villain-type.desc: Every great story needs a great villain. And somewhere in you, one is waiting. Answer 6 questions and find out exactly which kind of menace you'd be if the protagonist just pushed you a little harder.

Arriving perfectly and saying something unforgettable

mastermind.name: THE MASTERMIND
mastermind.kind: The One Who Planned All of This
mastermind.tagline: By the time they figure it out, you're already gone.
mastermind.desc: You've been running this plan since before anyone knew there was a plan. You're the type of villain who's already won when they walk into the room — they just haven't been told yet. You don't monologue. That's an amateur mistake you've studied extensively.

chaos.name: THE CHAOTIC VILLAIN
chaos.tagline: You didn't want to be the villain. You just kept making choices.
chaos.desc: You're not evil, you're just reactive and the situations keep getting worse. You started small. Then it snowballed. Now you're somehow the villain of a story you barely understood you were in. You're also kind of funny about it and that makes things more complicated.

sympathetic.name: THE SYMPATHETIC VILLAIN
sympathetic.kind: The One Who Had a Point
sympathetic.tagline: You're not wrong. That's what makes this hard.
sympathetic.desc: Your backstory is the problem — because once people hear it, they start to hesitate. You didn't choose this path, something was taken and you chose to take something back. You're the villain the audience feels guilty rooting against. That's actually the most powerful kind.

dramatic.name: THE THEATRICAL VILLAIN
dramatic.kind: The One In It For the Aesthetic
dramatic.tagline: You could've just asked nicely. But where's the drama in that.
dramatic.desc: You have a monologue ready. You've rehearsed the entrance. Your outfit is specific. You are here for the full theatrical experience and you will not rush it for anyone. The plan is secondary to the presentation and honestly? At least you're committed.

starbucks-order.title: Which Starbucks Order Are You?

matcha.name: MATCHA LATTE
matcha.tagline: You made better choices and your skin is the evidence.
matcha.desc: You are wellness-coded and you know it. Your morning routine has phases. You own things made of linen. You switched from coffee because you 'felt the difference' and you DID. The matcha is not just a drink — it's a commitment to the version of you that has it together.

espresso.name: ICED BROWN SUGAR ESPRESSO
espresso.tagline: You don't have time for warmth. You have things to do.
espresso.desc: You drink coffee like it's oxygen because it basically is at this point. You're already three tasks in before 9am. You have three tabs, two projects, and a plan — and you're running on this specific drink that somehow keeps everything moving. The oat milk is non-negotiable.

pink.name: THE PINK DRINK
pink.tagline: You choose it because it makes you happy. That's the whole answer.
pink.desc: You order what makes you smile and you will not be explaining yourself. It's pink. It's photogenic. It tastes like summer and joy. You're not here for the caffeine content — you're here for the experience, and the experience is delightful, and so are you.

gen-z-archetype.title: Which Gen Z Archetype Are You?
gen-z-archetype.desc: The algorithm has studied you. Now we will categorize you without mercy. Answer 6 questions and find out exactly which Gen Z type you are — and whether your TikTok FYP has been accurate this whole time.

Rest era. Not apologizing. The nap IS the work.

baddie.name: THE BADDIE ERA
baddie.tagline: Elevated. Unbothered. Your bar is in another building.
baddie.desc: You showed up to the main character era early and you haven't left. You know what you want, you look incredible while wanting it, and you've deleted people who couldn't match your energy with zero guilt. The boundaries aren't a trait — they're infrastructure.

softlife.name: THE SOFT LIFE ERA
softlife.tagline: Rest is radical. The nap is the point.
softlife.desc: You opted out of the grind and you're healing from the audacity of having done it. Comfort is not laziness — it's a lifestyle you chose on purpose. You have linen sheets, no 5am alarm, and a deep suspicion that hustle culture is a scam. You're probably right.

delulu.name: THE DELULU BELIEVER
delulu.tagline: Delulu is the solulu and you are living proof.
delulu.desc: You decided to believe and things started happening. Coincidence? You don't think so. You have a vision board, a manifesting playlist, and a confidence that people can't quite explain. The delusion is actually just faith with extra steps and statistically it's working.

goblin.name: GOBLIN MODE
goblin.tagline: Unfiltered. Authentic. Doing whatever that is. No notes.
goblin.desc: You opted out of the performance and you've never felt better. You eat weird meals at weird times. Your sense of humor is a niche Wikipedia page. You're not doing the aesthetic — you're doing the actual thing, which is being specifically, unapologetically yourself. It's actually rare.

overthinker-type.title: What Kind of Overthinker Are You?
overthinker-type.desc: If you clicked this quiz, you're already one of us. Answer 6 questions and we'll identify your specific overthinker subspecies — because yes, there are types, and yes, you've probably already started analyzing this description.

options.label: Replaying a conversation from 2019 and finding new things wrong
Started thinking about one thing and now it's somehow the apocalypse
Creating contingency plans for scenarios that haven't happened yet
Someone said 'sounds good' with a period and I need answers

questions.text: After hanging out with friends, you:

options.label: Replay the whole night and find at least one thing I said wrong
Wonder if everyone got home safe and then spiral from there
Start planning the next thing so there's no gap to worry in
Analyze every response to see if people actually had fun

questions.text: You get an email that starts with your full name. You think:

options.label: Did I do something wrong? Let me think about the last three months.
This is either fine or my life is over. No middle ground.
I should have a response template ready for exactly this.
The formal name means something. What does it mean.

questions.text: Someone doesn't text back for 2 hours. You:

options.label: Think back to the last thing I sent and trace where it went wrong
Immediately imagine three different crises they could be in
Draft a follow-up just in case and save three versions
Analyze the last conversation for signs I misread the vibe

questions.text: A decision needs to be made. You:

options.label: Keep going back to old decisions to make sure this one isn't also wrong
Can't decide because all paths lead somewhere potentially terrible
Make a spreadsheet. With a pros/cons column. And a risk tab.
Worry most about how each option will be perceived

questions.text: Someone says 'we need to talk.' Your first thought:

options.label: Immediate replay of everything that could have caused this
It's over. Everything is over. I already know.
I need to prepare for every possible version of this conversation
What did I do socially? When? To whom?

replayer.name: THE REPLAYER
replayer.tagline: The past is not done with you. Specifically: that thing you said in 2018.
replayer.desc: You have a photographic memory for exactly the wrong things. Past conversations play back in high definition at 2am with new commentary. You've already processed something three times and found a new interpretation. The good news: extraordinary emotional memory. The bad news: same.

catastrophist.name: THE CATASTROPHIST
catastrophist.tagline: One thought becomes a whole narrative and it ends badly.
catastrophist.desc: You don't catastrophize on purpose — you're just very thorough. If something could go wrong, you've already imagined it going wrong, grieved it, and prepared a response. The silver lining: nothing surprises you. The other thing: you've already lived the bad outcome 11 times before breakfast.

planner.name: THE OBSESSIVE PLANNER
planner.tagline: You don't have anxiety. You have a spreadsheet.
planner.desc: You converted your anxiety into infrastructure. You plan, prepare, draft, and pre-respond because if you control the variables, the bad thing can't happen. You've made contingency plans for your contingency plans. This is a coping mechanism and it sometimes WORKS.

social.name: THE SOCIAL ANALYST
social.tagline: You read the room so hard you gave yourself a headache.
social.desc: You process every interaction in real-time and then again later and then once more just to be sure. A short reply means something. Punctuation means something. You are exceptionally good at reading people — you're just also reading the ones who weren't thinking about any of this at all.

comfort-show.title: Which Comfort Show Are You?
comfort-show.desc: The show you put on when life is too much says everything about you. Answer 6 questions and we'll reveal which comfort show matches your whole personality and why it's been on autoplay this entire year.

questions.text: When everything feels like too much, you want:

options.label: Something familiar I don't have to think about at all
Something so intense my problems feel manageable by comparison
Something gentle, slow, and genuinely kind to me
Drama that isn't mine to fix but is very entertaining to watch

questions.text: Your watch history on any streaming service:

options.label: The same 3 shows I've already seen, cycling
Mostly true crime and thriller docs, all of them
Cooking competitions, baking shows, anything cozy
Reality TV, dating shows, anything with drama
Putting on something I know every word of and just existing in it
Watching people solve worse problems than mine
Making something with my hands while watching people do the same
Getting invested in someone else's situationship
The comfortable constant — always there, always the same good thing
The one who knows too much and notices too many things
The one who bakes something when you're sad and actually asks
The one who texts 'you will NOT believe this' and is always right
The couch. My show. My blanket. Zero new information.
A podcast about something true and slightly disturbing
Farmers market, baking something, clean slow energy
Catching up on an episode I've been waiting all week for
Mac and cheese — exactly as I've always had it. Don't change it.
A complex soup I made while listening to a true crime episode
A slice of something homemade with a cup of tea
Takeout eaten in front of whatever is causing chaos on my screen

rewatcher.name: THE COMFORT REWATCHER
rewatcher.tagline: You've seen it 11 times. You will watch it again tonight.
rewatcher.desc: You know every episode, every line, and you're watching it again anyway. The point is the safety of it — knowing exactly what happens, who survives, how the joke lands. New content feels risky. This content feels like coming home. Your show is your soft place to land and you've earned it.

crime.name: THE CRIME DOC ENTHUSIAST
crime.tagline: You process your anxiety by watching problems bigger than yours.
crime.desc: Watching true crime doesn't disturb you — it orients you. Other people's catastrophes help you calibrate your own. You know more about criminal psychology than you probably should, and you notice exits when you walk into rooms. It's not a red flag — it's research.

bakeoff.name: THE GREAT BRITISH BAKE OFF TYPE
bakeoff.tagline: You just want to watch nice people be kind to each other. Is that too much.
bakeoff.desc: You chose the show where everyone is supportive and the worst thing that happens is a soggy bottom. You need warmth and you know it. You're probably going through something and refusing to add more chaos to your viewing. Your nervous system deserves this. You are healing and also learning about choux pastry.

reality.name: THE REALITY TV DEVOTEE
reality.tagline: Their drama is your therapy and you will not explain yourself.
reality.desc: You process your own feelings through other people's drama and it is a completely valid psychological strategy. You pick sides. You text your friends mid-episode. You have opinions about strangers that are stronger than opinions about your own life. The chaos is cathartic. You will not be taking questions.

world-cup-country.title: Which World Cup 2026 Team Are You?
world-cup-country.desc: 48 nations. One trophy. Zero chill. Answer 8 questions and we'll tell you which World Cup 2026 team matches your entire personality. No VAR review required.

questions.text: Pick your vibe on the pitch:

options.label: Pure flair — I'm here to entertain
Calm, calculated, clinically efficient
Passionate chaos that somehow works
Prove every doubter wrong, every time

questions.text: The match is tied in the 90th minute. You:

Execute the set piece we rehearsed 400 times
Scream at the sky and score anyway
Dig in, go to extra time, grind it out
Nonstop memes and 47-second voice notes

Chest pounding, running straight to the fans

Pull a skill move so ridiculous they go quiet
Say nothing. Let the scoreline speak.
Take it personally and use it as fuel forever
Smile, train harder, shock the world

questions.text: Your World Cup legacy would be:

options.label: The most beautiful football ever played
Ruthlessly dominant and basically unfair
The most emotional rollercoaster in history
The moment an underdog changed everything

brazil.name: 🇧🇷 BRAZIL
brazil.tagline: You don't just play — you make it look like art.
brazil.desc: Pure flair. You make everything look effortless while everyone else sweats. Football isn't a job for you — it's self-expression. Five World Cup titles, the most beloved kit on the planet, and an energy so contagious it spreads through entire stadiums.

france.name: 🇫🇷 FRANCE
france.tagline: Calm, calculated, and frankly a little scary.
france.desc: Terrifyingly good and you know it. You don't need to show off — the results do that. Two World Cup titles, a squad deeper than the Atlantic, and a system so tight it almost feels illegal. You planned for every scenario three weeks ago.

argentina.name: 🇦🇷 ARGENTINA
argentina.tagline: Logic says stop. Your heart says keep going.
argentina.desc: And somehow — you win. Argentina's 2022 World Cup run was the most emotional story ever told in sport. You carry the weight of everyone's dreams, cry at every goal, and simply refuse to accept defeat. Three stars on the shirt. The drama is the point.

morocco.name: 🇲🇦 MOROCCO
morocco.tagline: Nobody saw you coming. That's your greatest weapon.
morocco.desc: Morocco became the first African nation to reach a World Cup semi-final in 2022 — not by luck, but by belief, organization, and sheer will. You never need to be the favourite. You just need to show up and let everyone else underestimate you.

pizza-order.title: What Your Pizza Order Says About You
pizza-order.desc: Answer 5 questions about your life choices and we'll expose your entire personality through pizza toppings. The algorithm is always right.

options.label: Take over and do it all yourself, obviously

Quietly finish before anyone else wakes up
Packed schedule from 8am to midnight

The one actually organizing the plans
Polite, present, maybe one emoji
Spiral immediately and tell everyone
Say 'it's fine' until it is fine
Already had three backup plans
Just leave quietly and deal with it alone
More is more is more
Classic never dies
I can do it better
Less is everything

extra.name: EXTRA CHEESE
extra.tagline: Too much? There is no such thing.
extra.desc: Everything you do is at 200%. Your texts are essays, your reactions are full-body events, and your playlists are 14 hours long. People adore you for it even when it's exhausting.

plain.name: PLAIN CHEESE
plain.desc: You don't need the bells and whistles and you are correct. While everyone else is overcorrecting, you are simply thriving on a foundation of good basics and zero drama.

supreme.name: SUPREME LOADED
supreme.tagline: Why have one thing when you can have everything?
supreme.desc: You want everything and you want it optimized. You've already decided you're right, written the follow-up email, and started the retrospective. Respect, honestly.

thin.name: THIN CRUST SNOB
thin.tagline: You have taste and you're not afraid to make it everyone's problem.
thin.desc: You care deeply about the right things and couldn't care less about the rest. Your opinions are specific, your aesthetic is curated, and your secret is that you're always right.

travel-style.title: What Type of Traveler Are You?
travel-style.desc: 5 questions to determine whether you're a spreadsheet tourist or a 'figure it out at the airport' type. No judgment. Some judgment.

options.label: Build a 47-tab spreadsheet with daily itinerary
Google the vibe, wing the rest
Research resorts and nothing else
Immediately start regretting it

questions.text: First thing you do on arrival:

options.label: Check off item one on the list
Walk until something interesting happens
Find the pool and not leave it
Miss your own bed
Color-coded, labeled, exactly 7kg

Sunscreen, book, more sunscreen
Overpacked comfort items
Executing the plan perfectly
The story you didn't expect to have
Golden hour by the water, no thoughts
Coming home honestly

questions.text: You see an unplanned detour. You:

options.label: It was on the list actually
You were born for this moment
Only if it leads to a beach
No

planner.name: THE PLANNER
planner.desc: You've pre-booked the restaurant that takes 6 weeks to get into. Your trip is a masterpiece of logistics. People complain about your spreadsheet until the hotel upgrade comes through.

adventurer.name: THE ADVENTURER
adventurer.tagline: You find the best things by getting gloriously lost.
adventurer.desc: You have been adopted by a local family, accidentally joined a wedding, and found a hidden beach that isn't on any map. Your travel insurance has been used. It was worth it.

beach.name: THE BEACH BABE
beach.tagline: You did not cross an ocean to look at things.
beach.desc: You've identified the perfect lounge chair and you will not be moving from it until the flight home. Sightseeing is for people who don't know how to vacation properly.

homebody.name: THE RELUCTANT TOURIST
homebody.tagline: You love the idea of travel more than the travel itself.
homebody.desc: You bought the ticket in a moment of inspiration and have spent every day since wishing you were in your own bed with your own snacks watching your own shows. Still had fun though.

spongebob-character.title: Which SpongeBob Character Are You?
spongebob-character.desc: 5 deeply unscientific questions to determine which Bikini Bottom resident you are. This is legally binding.

options.label: Jump out of bed ready to work, genuinely

sponge.desc: You feel things very loudly and love your job and cry a normal amount. You are inexplicably good at everything you try and people are both inspired and slightly overwhelmed by you.

pat.name: PATRICK STAR
pat.desc: You seem clueless but occasionally drop sentences that crack reality open. You live simply, love fully, and do not understand why everyone is always so stressed about things.

squid.name: SQUIDWARD
squid.desc: You have a gift, a vision, and zero patience for people who can't see it. You're not grumpy, you're just right about everything and waiting for the world to catch up.

sandy.name: SANDY CHEEKS
sandy.tagline: You came here from Texas and you're winning.
sandy.desc: You have a PhD, a karate black belt, and a tree dome. You set goals in the morning and achieve them before lunch. You are everyone's role model whether they asked or not.

morning-type.title: Are You a Morning Person or Night Owl?
morning-type.desc: Your sleep schedule says more about your personality than your horoscope. This quiz will expose it in 5 questions.

sunrise.name: SUNRISE GRINDER

sunrise.desc: You greet 6am like an old friend. Your mornings are sacred, structured, and slightly intimidating. People hate you a little but also want to be you and that's the real power.

owl.name: NIGHT OWL
owl.tagline: You come alive when the sensible people go to bed.
owl.desc: Your best ideas arrive at 1am. Your best work happens at 2am. Your best sleep happens at 4am and then through two alarms. You are a menace to morning meetings and an icon everywhere else.

napper.name: CHAOS NAPPER
napper.tagline: Sleep is a tool and you have mastered it.
napper.desc: You can fall asleep anywhere, wake up fully functional, and nap between obligations like a professional. Your sleep schedule exists on its own terms and it works somehow.

zombie.name: SLEEP-DEPRIVED ZOMBIE
zombie.desc: You are not a morning person or a night owl. You are a tired person making it work. Somehow you're still showing up, still delivering, still there. Respect. Sleep more.

mcdo.name: McDONALD'S

mcdo.desc: You are the baseline. The reference point. Every comparison eventually circles back to you. You've had eras, updated your look, survived discourse, and you are still here. Iconic.

taco.name: TACO BELL
taco.tagline: You invented things that shouldn't work and they worked.
taco.desc: You put nacho cheese in something that didn't need it and made a culinary masterpiece. Your ideas are chaotic, your execution is bold, and your fans are aggressively loyal at 1am.

chick.name: CHICK-FIL-A
chick.tagline: My pleasure. And you mean it.
chick.desc: You do one thing and you do it so well that people will wait in a line that wraps around the building. You are polished, principled, and your customer service is legendary and slightly unnerving.

innout.name: IN-N-OUT
innout.tagline: People who've had you will not stop telling people about you.
innout.desc: You are simple, fresh, and perfect. People who know you are borderline religious about you. People who haven't are confused by the hype until the first bite. Then they get it.

anxious.desc: 80% is your baseline and 20% is a code red. You have charged your phone in a parking lot. You have borrowed a charger from a stranger. You have plans in place and they run on full battery.

yolo.name: THE YOLO DRAINER

yolo.desc: You let it die and somehow the world doesn't end. You return after two hours offline looking rested. People text you frantically. You respond when you can. You are free.

charged.name: ALWAYS 100%
charged.tagline: You have never once felt low battery anxiety.
charged.desc: You charge overnight, top up at lunch, and leave the house at 98%. Your cable is coiled neatly. Your battery health is 100%. You are calm because you are prepared. Teach us.

warrior.name: 1% CHAMPION
warrior.tagline: You thrive on the edge and the edge is 3%.
warrior.desc: You have sent important emails at 2%. You have navigated without GPS at 1%. Your phone has died mid-sentence and you rebooted and continued without mentioning it. You are built different.

mulan.name: MULAN

mulan.desc: You were told you couldn't and you memorized that information and used it as fuel. You outperformed everyone, saved the country, and declined the easy reward. An icon of substance.

moana.name: MOANA
moana.tagline: The ocean chose you and you chose it back.
moana.desc: You feel called to something bigger than where you are. You go toward it even when it's terrifying. The ocean literally responds to you and your hair is doing incredible things in this wind.

rapunzel.name: RAPUNZEL
rapunzel.tagline: You were made for more and you are finally going.
traits: Quietly Dangerous with a Frying Pan
rapunzel.desc: You've been waiting for your moment and when it arrives you throw yourself into it with paint on your hands and a frying pan and impossible energy. You contain multitudes. You are unstoppable now.

cardio.name: THE CARDIO BUNNY

lifter.name: THE POWERLIFTER

lifter.desc: You came with a plan and you're executing it. You know your maxes, your rep ranges, your rest times. People instinctively move out of your way and you appreciate the efficiency.

yogi.name: THE YOGA DEVOTEE
yogi.tagline: Your gym bag contains essential oils.
yogi.desc: You came for the stretch and stayed for the transformation. You breathe intentionally, set intentions, and have left the gym feeling genuinely better about existence. The mat is sacred.

tourist.name: THE GYM TOURIST

tourist.desc: You go when you go and you don't go when you don't. The membership fee is a donation to future you. You've used the sauna once. It was transcendent. You'll be back eventually.

season-match.title: Which Season Matches Your Personality?

spring.name: SPRING

summer.desc: You peak in chaos. You are the friend everyone wants at the party, the person who makes every ordinary Tuesday memorable. You burn bright and you know it and the nights are endless.

autumn.name: AUTUMN
autumn.tagline: October is your entire personality and that's valid.
autumn.desc: You find beauty in endings. You own more candles than is reasonable. Your aesthetic is specific, your taste is impeccable, and you've been waiting for the temperature to drop since July.

winter.name: WINTER
winter.desc: You are quietest and strongest. You don't perform your feelings, you contain them. People mistake your stillness for coldness until you trust them enough to show the warmth that lives underneath.

ice-cream-flavor.title: What Ice Cream Flavor Are You?
ice-cream-flavor.desc: Your ice cream order tells the truth about you that therapy is still working up to. 5 questions. No lying.
