I'll try it if it's pretty honestly

questions.text: Someone you care about is upset. You:

options.label: Show up with food and listen for as long as needed
Talk it through, find the solution
Send a voice note and a playlist
Make them laugh until it's better
You're never that chaotic actually
You will argue a point past the point of winning
Incredibly intense about your preferences
You make everything about aesthetics
Everyone's favorite person there
The one with the surprising hot take
Deep in one good conversation all night
Looking great and being charming
Consistency that people build their lives around
You are unforgettable once they know you
You show up, always, no conditions
You make everything more beautiful

vanilla.name: CLASSIC VANILLA
vanilla.desc: You are the baseline everyone is measured against. Not boring — foundational. You are the friend people call at 2am, the constant in every equation. They say vanilla like it's an insult and they are wrong.

choc.name: DARK CHOCOLATE
choc.tagline: Rich, deep, and exactly what people need.
choc.desc: You are not for everyone and that is not your problem. The people who get you are devoted to you. You are complex, consistent, and slightly bitter when pushed. Your depth is the whole point.

straw.name: STRAWBERRY
straw.desc: You make everything look good and feel nice and you are learning that it's okay to be a little tart sometimes. Your natural warmth draws people in and your taste is impeccable.

mint.name: MINT CHOCOLATE CHIP
mint.tagline: Cool until suddenly not. The chip changes everything.
mint.desc: People don't know what to do with you at first. Then they try you. Then they're loyal forever or they're not. There is no middle ground with mint chocolate chip and there is no middle ground with you.

texting-style.title: What Does Your Texting Style Say About You?
texting-style.desc: Your texting habits are a full psychological profile. 5 questions will confirm everything.

questions.text: When you have something to say:

options.label: Send it across 7 separate messages as it occurs to you
One word that contains the full meaning if you know you know
Voice note, it's faster and more honest
Text plus 4 emojis that modify the entire tone
Send a follow-up just to clarify the first message
Same. You also haven't replied to three people.
Leave them a voice note asking if they're okay
React to their last message with something that has layers
Multiple paragraphs in real-time fragments
Shorter than this question
Audio file, 2 minutes 34 seconds
One sentence and then six emojis to recalibrate it

questions.text: You see someone typing... then they stop. You:

options.label: Already sent two more messages while you were watching
Didn't notice. Your phone is face down.
Send a voice note preemptively
React to the last thing with 👀

questions.text: Your texts would be described as:

options.label: A lot, but always full of something
Rare. Potent. People save them.
Personal, immediate, you can hear the tone
A hieroglyph system I need to decode

double.name: THE DOUBLE TEXTER
double.tagline: Your thoughts arrive in real time and you share all of them.
traits: A Lot in the Best Way
double.desc: You send messages as they occur to you. In fragments. In waves. The full picture only emerges across the whole conversation and it's actually a coherent masterpiece. People love getting your texts. There are many of them.

mono.name: THE ONE-WORD ORACLE
mono.tagline: 'k' as a complete statement of support.
mono.desc: You communicate in compression. One word carries more than other people's paragraphs. People who know you know what it means. New people find you confusing and then they crack the code and they're hooked.

voice.name: THE VOICE NOTE SENDER
voice.tagline: Why type when you can just... say it.
voice.desc: You tried typing it and it lost something. You sent a voice note instead and it was perfect. People who love you are used to the 2-minute audios. People who don't yet are learning. The tone is irreplaceable.

emoji.name: THE EMOJI ARCHITECT
emoji.desc: Your emoji usage is not decoration, it is the message. The 🙃 alone has done more emotional labor than most texts. People have screenshot your emoji sequences and sent them to others to decode. You are an artist.

bad-habit-type.title: What's Your Most Chaotic Bad Habit?
bad-habit-type.desc: We all have one. 5 questions to identify yours with clinical precision and zero judgment. (Some judgment.)

questions.text: When you owe someone a reply:

options.label: It's been three days and I know. I know.
Running 15 minutes late, will explain never
I replied in my head, does that count?
I bought something instead, long story
Multiple unread chats I'm emotionally avoiding
Notification for something I'll address tomorrow
Currently open. 73 tabs. It's fine.
An app I downloaded and then bought something in

questions.text: Plans with friends at 7pm. You leave the house:

options.label: 7:23pm, immediately text 'omw'
7pm. But from inside your phone.
After confirming three times you're going then going
7pm sharp because you impulse-bought an Uber subscription

questions.text: You tell yourself you'll do it:

options.label: After this episode. One more. Last one.
When I'm in the right headspace (it's a high bar)
Tomorrow morning. First thing. I mean it this time.
Right after this one purchase that will fix everything

questions.text: The thing you keep meaning to fix:

options.label: The texts I haven't answered since February
My relationship with being on time
The doomscrolling situation, tomorrow for sure
The impulse buying situation, just one more thing first

ghost.name: SERIAL GHOSTER
ghost.tagline: You read it. You cared. You said nothing.
ghost.desc: You don't ghost because you don't care. You ghost because you care too much and don't have the energy right now and then too much time has passed and now it's a thing. The people who know you, know this.

late.name: CHRONICALLY LATE
late.tagline: You genuinely believe you can make it in 5 minutes.
late.desc: You don't mean to be late. You believe deeply every time that this time you'll make it. The gap between your timeline and reality is a documented phenomenon among your friends. They built in 20 minutes. They know.

doom.name: DOOMSCROLLER
doom.desc: You opened the app to check one thing. That was 47 minutes ago. You have learned things, felt things, and consumed things you can't name. You will try to stop. After this. After definitely this one.

impulse.name: IMPULSE BUYER
impulse.tagline: It was on sale and it will fix everything.
impulse.desc: The thought 'I need this' and the purchase are the same moment for you. Sometimes it's genius. Sometimes it's a gadget you describe to no one. Your browser history is a mood board and a cautionary tale.

tv-watcher.title: How Do You Actually Watch TV?
tv-watcher.desc: Your streaming habits say everything about you. 5 questions to determine which type of viewer you are.

questions.text: New show drops. All 8 episodes. You:

options.label: Cancel all plans. See you in 6 hours.
One episode tonight, no more, self-discipline
Already read the wiki summary
Watch the first 10 minutes of each to decide
Next episode is already loading
Close the app. Done for tonight. Really.
Immediately go to Reddit for discourse
Evaluate the pilot and make a spreadsheet decision
Finished it. Three days ago. Fully processed.
Season 2, episode 4, taking it slow
I know everything about it without watching
Sampling several things, nothing committed to
Already done. Finished it before they could.
Actually upset. I was savoring this.
You asked for this spoiler specifically
You hadn't committed yet so neutrally fine
Fully consumed, constantly adding more
Several things in progress simultaneously, methodically
Titles I know everything about and may never watch
400 items in stages of consideration

binge.name: BINGE LORD
binge.tagline: Sleep is optional. The finale is not.
binge.desc: When you start something you finish it. At 3am. On a Tuesday. You process entire seasons of emotional arcs in one sitting and then talk about nothing else for a week. You are either very done or very in it.

episode.name: ONE PER NIGHT
episode.tagline: You are savoring it and we respect that.
episode.desc: One episode. Then bed. You know what happened a week later because you actually took it in. You avoid spoilers with the intensity of someone protecting a gift. The journey is the point for you.

spoiler.name: SPOILER SEEKER
spoiler.tagline: You need to know if it's worth the feelings first.
spoiler.desc: You read the ending first so you can enjoy the journey without the threat of devastation. This is a logical coping strategy. You have never been blindsided by a plot twist. This is called winning.

preview.name: PERPETUAL SAMPLER
preview.tagline: Your watchlist is a museum of intentions.
preview.desc: You know a lot about many shows and have finished very few. The first episode of something is your comfort food. You hold the remote with the power of someone who has many options and is about to make none.

color-personality.title: What Color Matches Your Personality?
color-personality.desc: Not your favorite color. Your actual color — the one that shows up in how you live. 5 questions.

options.label: The one bringing energy and warmth
Quietly the most interesting person there
Calm, reliable, everyone comes to you
Unforgettable and a little overwhelming
Optimistic until proven otherwise
Complex and carefully contained
Even, deep, rarely ruffled
Felt loudly and shared openly
Gut feeling, immediate, usually right
Research, analysis, then the decision
Logic, fairness, the best outcome for everyone
Heart first, consequences later, no regrets
Bright, warm, things that make people smile
Rich, dark, things with history
Clean, calm, intentional white space
Bold, maximalist, looks like a personality
Joy. You make things better by being there.
Perspective. You see what others don't.
Stability. You are the reliable one.
Honesty. You will say the thing.

yellow.name: GOLDEN YELLOW
yellow.tagline: You make everywhere warmer just by being in it.
yellow.desc: You are the light in the room and you don't even know it. People leave conversations with you feeling better. Your energy is a resource other people rely on and you give it freely. Protect it sometimes.

purple.name: DEEP PURPLE
purple.tagline: Uncommon. Can't be copied. Historically significant.
purple.desc: You are not surface-level and you don't pretend to be. Your depth is your whole thing. People who earn your trust find layers they didn't expect. You are an acquired appreciation and worth every bit of it.

blue.name: ELECTRIC BLUE
blue.tagline: Clear, consistent, impossible to ignore when you speak.
blue.desc: You are the person people call when it matters. You are steady without being boring, clear without being cold. You don't chase attention but when you speak the room recalibrates. That's power.

pink.name: HOT PINK
pink.tagline: You walk in and people notice. That's by design.
pink.desc: You are not for subtlety and subtlety is not for you. You are fully committed to being exactly who you are at full volume. People either love it or they need to adjust. They usually adjust.

snack-2am.title: What Snack Are You at 2AM?
snack-2am.desc: Who you are at 2am is who you actually are. 5 questions to identify your true midnight snack self.

options.label: Couldn't stop thinking, now I'm here
The leftovers called me, I had to answer
I was already awake, this is my time
I'm not hungry I'm just here
Nostalgic, soft, a little melancholy
Practical, efficient, this is a meal not a crisis
Committed. This snack deserves my full attention.
Present but not entirely here, if that makes sense
A memory or a feeling or a whole thing
Nothing, I'm just hungry, not everything is deep
The satisfying sound of the bag honestly
The ceiling. The concept of time. The universe.
The playlist called 'nostalgic hours'
The leftover is enough entertainment
Something with bass, the neighbors are asleep anyway
Silence or something ambient and inexplicable
The night I had cereal and figured something out
Good pasta honestly. That was good pasta.
The bag was gone before I knew what happened
You won't really. And that's okay.

cereal.name: CEREAL AT 2AM
cereal.tagline: The bowl is for feelings, the cereal is just there.
cereal.desc: You are not actually craving cereal. You're craving the version of yourself that had no responsibilities and ate cereal for dinner on purpose. The bowl is a portal. The feelings are real. The cereal is fine.

leftover.name: COLD LEFTOVERS
leftover.tagline: It was better cold and you knew it.
leftover.desc: You are not romanticizing this. There was food. You needed food. The microwave would have changed the texture and you respect the food too much. You ate from the container over the sink. It was correct.

chips.name: CHIPS FROM THE BAG
chips.tagline: The bag is gone. You have no regrets.
chips.desc: You opened it for 'a few' and the next thought you had was that the bag was lighter than expected. You were completely absorbed in the act of existing and eating and it was actually wonderful. No regrets.

vibes.name: JUST VIBES
vibes.tagline: You weren't hungry. You were existing.
vibes.desc: You went to the kitchen for something and stood in the fridge light for three minutes and then closed it. You weren't hungry. You needed a change of location. You went back to bed. You are fine.

pet-personality.title: Are You More Dog or Cat?
pet-personality.desc: This quiz doesn't care what pets you have. It cares what kind of creature you ARE. 5 questions. The truth awaits.

questions.text: Someone you don't know well says hi:

options.label: New friend! Immediately engaged!
Acknowledge, assess, remain composed
Enormous chaos for no clear reason
I just nodded and moved on honestly

questions.text: Your energy when someone comes home:

options.label: Every time is a reunion, every time matters
Aware. Deliberate approach if they deserve it.
Something dramatic and completely unexplained
Acknowledged them, continued what I was doing
Direct approach, very clear communication
Position myself to be discovered, wait
Knock something off a surface
I'll handle it myself actually
Close proximity is always welcome
On my terms, when I decide, briefly
Variable. Completely random. Non-negotiable.
Considerable personal space required at all times

questions.text: Your vibe when things get chaotic:

options.label: Here to help, extremely present, possibly in the way
Watching from a height, mildly curious
The source of the chaos or very invested in it
I went to another room when this started

dog.name: 100% DOG
dog.tagline: Every day with you is the best day they've ever had.
dog.desc: You love loudly and completely. When you care about someone it is obvious because you show up every single time with the same full energy. People feel seen by you. That is the rarest and best quality.

cat.name: PURE CAT
cat.tagline: You chose them and that means something.
cat.desc: You don't give your energy to everyone and that makes it worth something when you do. The people you've decided on know it. You show up on your terms and it is exactly enough and they know it.

chaos.name: CHAOS PET ENERGY
chaos.tagline: You operate outside the systems everyone else uses.
chaos.desc: Nobody can predict you and you like it that way. You are a 3am zoomie in human form. You knocked something over and you'd do it again. The people who love you have just factored this in.

none.name: NO PETS JUST VIBES
none.tagline: You are a whole ecosystem already.
none.desc: You don't need a pet because you've already achieved the energy yourself. You are clean, intentional, and don't require much from others. Your space is yours and it is exactly how you want it.

superpower-match.title: What Superpower Matches Your Personality?
superpower-match.desc: Your answer to this quiz is what your superpower would actually be, not what you think you'd want. Brace yourself.

questions.text: At a party you don't want to be at:

options.label: Slip out before anyone notices you're gone
Rewind to when you could have said no
Know exactly who to avoid before it's obvious
Already at the next one honestly

questions.text: Your real power in daily life:

options.label: Disappearing from group chats with no consequences
Knowing what someone is about to say before they say it
Reverse the last 30 seconds of any conversation
Moving faster than most people think is possible

questions.text: What you'd actually use the power for:

options.label: Leaving situations without the conversation
Going back and saying the thing I thought of later
Never being genuinely surprised by anyone's behavior
The commute situation. Solved. Done.
Sometimes people forget I'm even there
Trapped in a loop fixing one conversation forever
Knowing what people actually think of me
Never being able to just sit still
The ability to disappear when it's too much
Control over the things that already happened
Being right about people before they show you
Moving through the world faster than it moves at you

invis.name: INVISIBILITY
invis.tagline: You want to be seen on your terms only.
invis.desc: You chose invisibility because you'd use it constantly and honestly that's fair. You want to opt out of being observed when it's too much. You notice everything and want to control what notices you back.

time.name: TIME CONTROL
time.tagline: You live in the past enough to want to edit it.
time.desc: You replay conversations at 3am finding the perfect response. With time control you'd finally send it. You'd undo the thing, redo it better, and arrive five minutes earlier than you originally did. Perfect.

read.name: MIND READING
read.tagline: You read people already. This just makes it official.
read.desc: You've always had a version of this. You notice things before people say them. You see through performances. Actual mind reading would just confirm everything you suspected and you are ready for that information.

fly.name: FLYING
fly.tagline: You'd leave. Immediately. In the air.
fly.desc: The moment you got the power you'd be gone. Not running from something — running toward everything. The commute, the view, the next place, the open sky. You were always designed to move and now you finally can.

spotify-listener.title: What Type of Spotify Listener Are You?
spotify-listener.desc: Your streaming habits are a full character analysis. 5 questions to identify your exact listener type.

options.label: Over 200 playlists, categorized, never touched again
One playlist, same 12 songs, since 2019
Whatever the algorithm made for me today
My vinyl collection is my streaming library, is my identity

questions.text: When you find a song you love:

options.label: Add it to six playlists and move on
Listen to it until it's physically part of you
The algorithm will remind me when I need it
Deep dive the artist, their influences, their era
Extremely varied and means nothing
The same 5 songs 400 times each. I know.
Somehow exactly correct every year
Objectively better than yours

questions.text: Someone asks for a song rec:

options.label: Send them 12, organized by mood and tempo
The same song you recommend to everyone
Tell them to trust the algorithm honestly
A comprehensive tour of a genre they didn't ask about
Whatever playlist I made at 1am that one time
The one
The Daily Mix, it knows me better than I do
Something you haven't heard of yet, don't worry about it

hoarder.name: THE PLAYLIST HOARDER
hoarder.tagline: 244 playlists and you listen to exactly 3 of them.
hoarder.desc: You make the playlist. You name it. You add 40 songs. You listen to it once. You make another. Your library is a museum of moods you were in and moments you planned for. It's actually beautiful in there.

repeat.name: THE REPEAT OFFENDER
repeat.tagline: When you find the song you stay.
traits: This Song Is Your Whole Thing
repeat.desc: You found it and it's the one and you will not apologize. You've heard it 847 times. It still gets you. Each listen adds a layer. Spotify tried to play something else once and you manually went back.

algo.name: ALGORITHM TRUSTS
algo.tagline: You gave yourself over to it and you feel at peace.
algo.desc: The algorithm knows. You don't question it. It has surfaced songs you needed exactly when you needed them. You have a symbiotic relationship with a machine and you are at peace with that. Smart.

snob.name: THE CONCERT SNOB
snob.tagline: You heard it before it was a thing. You need people to know this.
snob.desc: Your taste has standards and those standards have requirements. You saw them live before the album. You have opinions about production choices. The mainstream discovering your artist is complicated for you.

holiday-personality.title: What Type of Holiday Person Are You?
holiday-personality.desc: Your holiday behavior is a personality test wrapped in tinsel. 5 questions to determine your festive type.

options.label: The decorations are already up. October 25th actually.
Make a detailed list of everything needed
Acknowledge that the season has technically begun
The holiday is when? Good thing I saw this quiz.
Done. Since August. All wrapped. Labeled.
December 24th, 4pm, full panic, peak results
Gifts are meaningless, presence is enough, no
Gift wrapping is where the magic lives actually
A curated festive experience you built yourself
Exactly as planned with a timeline and a budget
The same as always, maybe a candle
Hasn't changed yet, will get to it
Mariah Carey the moment it is legally allowed
A curated playlist by tempo and occasion
People keep playing it everywhere and you are tired
It's playing somewhere, that's nice
The whole event is elevated by your involvement
You made sure everyone's needs were met perfectly
You showed up and that was your contribution
You arrived late with wine and it was fine

decorator.name: THE DECORATOR
decorator.tagline: Your home in December is a spiritual experience.
decorator.desc: The holidays aren't a season, they're a lifestyle you've been building since the leaves changed. Every corner has something. Every detail was intentional. People walk into your space and feel it. That's a gift.

planner.name: THE OVER-PLANNER
planner.tagline: There is a spreadsheet. There is always a spreadsheet.
planner.desc: You planned the magic and then executed it. The gifts are wrapped. The reservation is made. The itinerary accounts for traffic. People around you enjoy the holidays more because you did the invisible work. Thank you.

grinch.name: THE HOLIDAY SKEPTIC
grinch.tagline: You are there. You are participating. That is enough.
grinch.desc: The decorations don't do much for you. The music starts too early. But you show up, you engage, you eat the food, and somewhere in there is a genuine warmth you wouldn't call it that but it's there.

latey.name: THE LAST MINUTE
latey.tagline: You did it. In the last hour. It was perfect somehow.
latey.desc: You work best under the specific pressure of 'the store closes in 45 minutes.' Your gifts are chaotic and personal and occasionally wrapped in a tote bag. You arrived late and brought the energy. It landed.

rom-com-role.title: Which Rom-Com Character Are You?
rom-com-role.desc: Every rom-com needs a full cast of characters. 5 questions to determine exactly which one you are. Pray for lead.

options.label: Overthink it for 45 minutes then respond perfectly
Help draft the perfect response for someone else
Do not answer. Keep them guessing.
Complicate things significantly by existing

questions.text: Your role in your friends relationships:

options.label: The one the relationship is happening to
The advice dispenser, the airport driver
The cautionary tale they reference
You appear at a key moment and create tension
Are either the recipient or the sender, nothing in between
Helped plan it and drove the getaway car
Once received one, walked away anyway
Your arrival IS the grand gesture unfortunately
Learns to let someone in. Classic.
Was right the whole time, gets nothing for it
Redeemable or not, there is no in between
Humbled by the third act, probably
Running through an airport or equivalent
Happy at the wedding, single, thriving actually
Ambiguous ending, sequel potential honestly
A lesson was learned. Possibly yours.

lead.name: THE LEAD
lead.tagline: Everything happens to you and it is exactly as dramatic as it sounds.
lead.desc: You are the one the story is about. Feelings arrive fully formed and at full volume. There is a theme song that plays during your commute. You have met someone in a meet-cute. You did not plan this.

bestie.name: THE BEST FRIEND
bestie.tagline: You gave excellent advice and they used it on someone else.
bestie.desc: You are the most interesting person in every scene you are in. You have the best lines. You help, you support, you make the thing happen, and then the credits roll and the poster had other people on it. Justice for you.

ex.name: THE EX
ex.tagline: You show up right when things were going well.
ex.desc: Your timing is always perfect in the worst way. You appear at restaurants, airports, and emotional peak moments. You are not the villain exactly. You are the complication. The story needed you.

obstacle.name: THE OBSTACLE
obstacle.tagline: You thought you were winning right up until the third act.
obstacle.desc: You entered the situation with a clear advantage and left with a lesson. You were not the villain. You were the person who made the love story matter by making it difficult. You probably deserved better. Probably.
